opportunities.why_this_fits: ANDY WANG FAMILY FOUNDATION has a track record of supporting organizations like Patient Safety Movement Foundation. As a CA-based foundation with 100% in-state giving, they prioritize local organizations. Notably, EL MODENA WRESTLING BOOSTER CLUB received $5,000 in 2023 for: PAYMENTS TO EL MODENA WRESTLING BOOSTER CLUB TO PROVIDE NECESSARY SAFETY EQUIPMENT TO LOW-INCOME FAMILIES, PROVIDE HYGIENE MATERIALS TO ENSURE SAFE COMPETITION, TRAINING EQUIPMENT, ENTRY INTO SEVERAL UPCOMING WRESTLING TOURNAMENTS. Their giving has been increasing, suggesting capacity for new grantees. **Note:** Verify application process before outreach.
opportunities.positioning_strategy: Frame your request around a specific program or initiative, as this foundation favors program-specific grants (50%). Consider requesting $7,200 - $13,500 based on their $9,000 median grant. Emphasize your local CA presence and community impact.

next_steps.action: Research ANDY WANG FAMILY FOUNDATION's recent grants and stated priorities
Draft Letter of Inquiry highlighting alignment with foundation priorities
Identify potential board or staff connections for warm introduction

opportunities.why_this_fits: LEGACY HEALTH ENDOWMENT has a track record of supporting organizations like Patient Safety Movement Foundation. As a CA-based foundation with 98% in-state giving, they prioritize local organizations. Notably, LELAND STANFORD JUNIOR UNIVERSITY received $150,000 in 2023 for: RESEARCH TO EXPAND COST SAVING DELIVERY OF HIGH QUALITY HEALTH CARE **Note:** Verify application process before outreach.
opportunities.positioning_strategy: Frame your request around a specific program or initiative, as this foundation favors program-specific grants (80%). Consider requesting $28,000 - $52,500 based on their $35,000 median grant. Emphasize your local CA presence and community impact. Apply via: https://LEGACYHEALTHENDOWMENT.ORG
